groups.title: Start Here
groups.purpose: The shortest safe command path for a normal FoxClaw session.

commands.title: Git Status
commands.purpose: Show branch and dirty files before changing anything.
commands.when: Run first when you need repo truth.

commands.title: FoxClaw Gym
commands.purpose: Show demo readiness and next attention.
commands.when: Run at the start of a FoxClaw work session.

commands.title: Visitor Guide
commands.purpose: Print the plain-language first-encounter guide.
commands.when: Use before showing FoxClaw to someone new.

commands.title: Apollo 1 Intake
commands.purpose: Check Apollo 1 standalone packet-intake continuity.
commands.when: Run before FoxClaw-to-CoinFox packet/source work.

commands.title: Source Discovery
commands.purpose: Find the fastest public source lanes for packet intake.
commands.when: Run before a manual Market Pulse or Idea Board pass.

commands.title: Interaction Potential
commands.purpose: Rank public-safe observations by likely useful user reaction.
commands.when: Run before choosing CoinFox discussion cards.

commands.title: Packet Demo With Trust Metadata
commands.purpose: Render a sanitized FoxClaw-to-CoinFox curated packet with review labels.
commands.when: Run before showing the packet bridge in a demo.

groups.title: CoinFox Packet Intake
groups.purpose: Manual-first packet review, anti-poisoning, source registry, and trust metadata commands.

commands.title: Packet Demo
commands.purpose: Render the baseline public-safe curated packet fixture.
commands.when: Use for the cleanest FoxClaw-to-CoinFox packet demo.

commands.title: Packet Demo JSON
commands.purpose: Emit the packet fixture as JSON for contract inspection.
commands.when: Use when checking exact packet fields.

commands.title: CoinFox Coordination Demo
commands.purpose: Print the four-packet FoxClaw-CoinFox coordination ledger demo.
commands.when: Use before wiring any FoxClaw/CoinFox coordination behavior.

commands.title: Unknown Source Corroborated Packet
commands.purpose: Show that a clean unknown source can pass after two independent corroborations.
commands.when: Use for the anti-poisoning demo case.

commands.title: Prompt Injection Block
commands.purpose: Show sanitized quarantine behavior for prompt-injection content.
commands.when: Use when proving public packet intake fails closed.

commands.title: Prediction-Market Odds Watch Packet
commands.purpose: Render a prediction-market/watch-source packet with trust metadata.
commands.when: Use when inspecting odds-move packet JSON.

groups.title: Source And Reaction
groups.purpose: Commands for finding information fast and ranking what users may react to.

commands.title: Source Discovery JSON
commands.purpose: Emit the source inventory report as JSON.
commands.when: Use for exact counts or machine-readable source review.

commands.title: Interaction Potential JSON
commands.purpose: Emit interaction-potential rankings as JSON.
commands.when: Use for exact scores and labels.

commands.title: Interaction Potential For Intake File
commands.purpose: Score a reviewed packet-intake worksheet by likely user reaction.
commands.when: Replace the placeholder path after creating a reviewed intake JSON file.

groups.title: Forecast Desk
groups.purpose: Paper-only forecast desk, Kalshi fixture, learning, and schema checks.

commands.title: Kalshi Fixture Doctor
commands.purpose: Check the read-only Kalshi adapter against fixtures.
commands.when: Use before touching event-contract adapter work.

commands.title: Kalshi Fixture Markets
commands.purpose: List fixture event-contract markets through the adapter.
commands.when: Use when inspecting adapter normalization.

commands.title: Forecast Desk Doctor
commands.purpose: Emit paper-only Forecast Desk health and silence diagnostics.
commands.when: Use before demoing the forecast desk.

commands.title: Forecast Learning Spine
commands.purpose: Build a deterministic learning receipt from resolved paper outcomes.
commands.when: Use to show how FoxClaw learns after outcomes.

commands.title: Forecast Replay
commands.purpose: Replay paper positions without future leakage.
commands.when: Use to verify paper simulation behavior.

commands.title: Forecast Scoreboard
commands.purpose: Build a deterministic paper scoreboard.
commands.when: Use to inspect paper-only performance receipts.

commands.title: Forecast Self-Funding Gate
commands.purpose: Evaluate the self-funding claim gate in fixture mode.
commands.when: Use to prove no paper result grants funding authority.

commands.title: Forecast Schema Check
commands.purpose: Verify the frozen Forecast Desk SQLite schema artifact.
commands.when: Run with validation after forecast storage changes.

commands.title: Forecast Public Export Demo
commands.purpose: Write safe static FoxClaw Hunt files from fixture data.
commands.when: Review the output path before running.

groups.title: Apollo Ops
groups.purpose: A1/A2 coordination, courier, and local mesh visibility.

commands.title: Apollo Courier Lanes
commands.purpose: Show configured Apollo courier lanes.
commands.when: Use before branch or lane sync work.

commands.title: Apollo 1 Intake JSON
commands.purpose: Emit Apollo 1 intake continuity as JSON.
commands.when: Use for exact readiness counts.

commands.title: Apollo Node Brief Fixture
commands.command: python tools\apollo_node_brief.py --fixture --node-id A1 --peer-node A2 --current-slice "FoxClaw command center" --next-request "pull, read docs\foxclaw_commands.md, run python tools\foxclaw_commands.py" --note "command list is operator-facing"
commands.purpose: Generate a pasteable A1-to-A2 coordination brief.
commands.when: Use before handing this command-center lane to A2.

commands.title: Apollo Mesh Doctor
commands.purpose: Inspect local mesh identity and inbox/outbox counts.
commands.when: Use when checking local founder mesh health.

commands.title: Apollo Mesh Pulse
commands.purpose: Emit a local founder mesh pulse and sync.
commands.when: Run only when intentionally writing an Apollo pulse receipt.

groups.title: Public Demo
groups.purpose: Small safe demo commands for explaining FoxClaw.

commands.title: Public Intelligence Card Demo
commands.purpose: Render a public intelligence card fixture as Markdown.
commands.when: Use for a lightweight public-card demo.

commands.title: Redshift Paper Boundary
commands.purpose: Emit the deterministic FoxClaw-to-Redshift paper receipt boundary.
commands.when: Use to show FoxClaw context without live authority.

commands.title: Public Intelligence Export
commands.purpose: Export deterministic public intelligence files for CoinFox staging.
commands.when: Review the output folder before running.

commands.title: Microscope Help
commands.purpose: Show the private Microscope CLI commands.
commands.when: Use before listing or previewing accepted candidates.

commands.title: Microscope Batch Help
commands.purpose: Show dry-run/write-staging options for Microscope batch work.
commands.when: Use before any local staging pass.

commands.title: Microscope List Recent
commands.purpose: List sanitized accepted-candidate metadata from a reviewed local database.
commands.when: Replace the placeholder DB path only after confirming the database is safe.

groups.title: Validation
groups.purpose: Checks to run after FoxClaw code or contract changes.

commands.title: Focused Packet/Source Tests
commands.command: python -m pytest tests\unit\test_interaction_potential.py tests\unit\test_apollo1_intake.py tests\unit\test_source_discovery_inventory.py tests\security\test_packet_trust_metadata_v0.py tests\security\test_source_registry_v0.py -q -p no:cacheprovider
commands.purpose: Run the focused FoxClaw-to-CoinFox packet/source/interaction checks.
commands.when: Use after packet, source, trust metadata, or interaction-potential edits.

commands.title: Full Test Suite
commands.purpose: Run the full FoxClaw test suite.
commands.when: Use before handoff or commit.

commands.title: Structural Invariants
commands.purpose: Check FoxClaw structural invariants.
commands.when: Run after code moves or boundary-sensitive work.

commands.title: Diff Whitespace Check
commands.purpose: Check staged and unstaged diffs for whitespace errors.
commands.when: Run before handoff or commit.
